name: Sweet Pepper Saute
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heavy fry pan or wok over medium to medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and cook until fragrant but not burned.
3. Add the julienne peppers and saute quickly, just until tender but still crisp.
4. Stir in balsamic vinegar, salt, and pepper.
5. Serve immediately or at room temperature. Serves 4.
Note: Good as a vegetable or as a condiment. Good on roast beef or chicken sandwiches, over a hamburger, or tossed into a green salad.
